overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving on a snowy highway through mountainous winter terrain. The driver overtakes a white bus and later a red tanker truck before entering a stone tunnel. Game engine footage featuring falling snow, windshield wipers, and dense forest landscapes.

segments.scene_description: The video opens with a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving through a snowy rural landscape. The driver overtakes a white bus on the left while passing open fields and scattered farm buildings visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The landscape transitions from open fields to a dense snow-covered forest as the highway winds through mountainous terrain. Metal guardrails appear along the road edge, and a speed limit sign indicates 70 km/h.

segments.scene_description: The driver overtakes a large red tanker truck on the left while continuing through the dense forest. Towards the end of the segment, a stone tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead.

agents.ego_description: driving into the dark tunnel entrance, leaving the snowy landscape behind

arched stone ceiling of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and enters the stone tunnel, transitioning from the bright snowy exterior to the dark, enclosed interior. The rough stone walls and arched ceiling of the tunnel become visible as the vehicle leaves the winter landscape behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels from an open snowy countryside into the dark enclosure of a mountain tunnel. It begins by overtaking a white bus amidst wide rural fields and scattered farm buildings under a winter sky. As the highway winds deeper into the mountains, the open landscape shifts into a dense, snow-covered forest lined with metal guardrails and speed limit signs. The camera then tracks the vehicle as it passes a large red tanker truck, moving through the thick woods until a stone tunnel entrance appears on the horizon. Finally, the bright exterior light vanishes as the truck enters the tunnel, transitioning into a dark space defined by rough stone walls and an arched ceiling.
